title: Migraine
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives unless reuse terms are confirmed for the exact content.
supports: Migraine is a headache disorder with symptoms that may include severe headache, nausea, and sensitivity to light or sound.
Treatment focuses on relieving symptoms and preventing future attacks.
Patients should work with clinicians on medication choice and prevention strategy.
This source supports migraine education, not ED secondary-headache exclusion.
